name: PC Engine
description: NEC and Hudson Soft's compact home console platform, known as TurboGrafx-16 in North America. Known for shooters, arcade ports, HuCard games, and early CD-ROM console support.

eras.title: HuCard Era
eras.description: Early card-based library focused on shooters, arcade ports, action games, and Hudson/NEC's compact console identity.

eras.title: CD-ROM Era
eras.description: CD-ROM add-ons expand the platform with larger games, CD audio, RPGs, and ambitious late releases.
